summary: Set 034 — Session Set Explorer honesty pass. Scoped as a two-session styling iteration; Session 1 + 2 folded into a single conversation mid-set after operator review of the round-5 preview surfaced that the per-row orchestrator-tracking accordion (gauges + model description + smart CTA + ACTUAL/SUGGESTED mismatch row) was nonfunctional and misleading: signalKind always 'current' under the Set 033 adapter regardless of recorded staleness; effort tracking via /think_* slash commands retired in Set 033 H2 (no longer observed); Gemini Code Assist + GitHub Copilot have no hook path so gauges were either empty or whatever the last manual checkout claimed. Set scope re-decided mid-session to retire the entire orchestrator-tracking display surface until Set 036+ delivers a real chatSessionId-backed signal. Tree shell restructured: per-row chevron + per-row state-badge icon retired in favor of a bold color-coded progress-fraction list-icon on the LEFT (fixed-width column, right-aligned within); row name + optional description sit to its right and wrap freely (second line indents under the first line; fraction stays outdented). Fraction colors: in-progress rgb(86,180,233) both themes, not-started rgb(127,127,127)/rgb(187,187,187) light/dark, complete rgb(0,158,115)/rgb(0,197,140) light/dark. Bucket headers (IN PROGRESS / NOT STARTED / COMPLETE / CANCELLED) became the SOLE collapse affordance: click toggles body; chevron ▾/▸. Heading padding bumped 6/8 top/bottom for ample air. Row description dropped the N/M prefix (fraction is the icon) and trailing 'Complete' word; in-progress reads just 'session N in flight'; not-started/complete/cancelled rows have no description. Cursor-anchored right-click context menu shipped: replaces the v0.18.1 showQuickPick (top-of-window) with a native-style popup at the cursor. New protocol messages: RenderContextMenuMsg (host->webview) ships applicable actions as {label, commandId}; ExecuteRowCommandMsg (webview->host) fires on item click — host looks up set by slug and dispatches with [{ set }]. Menu styled with --vscode-menu-* CSS variables. Group-band separators inserted between Open/Navigate/Copy/Lifecycle bands. Esc/click-outside/window-resize/scroll close. Popup flips inward if near right/bottom viewport edge. Orchestrator group retired from ActionRegistry: dabbler.checkOutOrchestrator (was 501), dabbler.releaseCheckOut (was 502), dabbler.openOrchestratorWriterLog (was 503) removed from right-click; commands stay registered in extension.ts for Command Palette. CustomSessionSetsView.buildRow no longer invokes OrchestratorAccordion.renderAccordionBody / accordionStateFromOrchestratorBlock / recommendationFor / pickEmptyStateCta; row payload ships accordionHtml: null universally. Protocol's accordionHtml/accordionUpdatedAt kept for structural compat. ArrowRight/ArrowLeft handlers collapsed to no-ops (nothing to expand). COMMAND_ALLOWLIST trimmed of the orchestrator entries. Cascading 'Check Out As…' preview from round 5 archived at docs/proposals/2026-05-21-context-menu-cascade/preview.html for Set 036+ reactivation. Files: tree.css (row layout + bucket collapse + fraction colors + ample header padding + context-menu popup styles), client.js (chevron+icon+accordion render dropped; row-fraction span + bucket collapse handler + cursor-anchored menu render added), CustomSessionSetsView.ts (accordion build skipped; fraction field; cursor-anchored menu post; allowlist trimmed), ActionRegistry.ts (orchestrator group removed; test assertions updated to 14-action shape), sessionSetsWebviewProtocol.ts (fraction field + RenderContextMenuMsg + ExecuteRowCommandMsg), CHANGELOG.md (0.19.0 entry), CLAUDE.md (version walk extended). Version bump 0.18.1 → 0.19.0. Tests: Layer 1 643 passed + 1 skipped; Layer 2 462 passed (2 pre-existing failures unrelated: configEditor-foundation stub gap + notificationsSection regex). Layer 3 (Playwright) refresh of three scenarios in session-sets-tree.spec.ts deferred to follow-on cleanup (carries from Set 035; row shape changes require updated assertions). Routed end-of-session verification deferred in favor of operator on-device visual verification of the live VS Code extension host pre-publish (5+ preview iteration rounds + packaged VSIX validation; routed verifier reads source not pixels). vsce publish ran clean: DarndestDabbler.dabbler-ai-orchestration v0.19.0 LIVE on Marketplace at https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=DarndestDabbler.dabbler-ai-orchestration before this close-out. Companion PyPI release: none — Python writer untouched. Cumulative routed Set 034 spend: $0 (no ai_router calls). Set 036 (chatSessionId implementation) remains not-started — operator-directed defer pending re-evaluation of when/how the orchestrator-tracking display surface returns.
